text: Apple reported Q2 2025 revenue of $95.4B, up 5% year-over-year. Services reached $26.6B, an all-time high.
Microsoft posted Q2 2025 revenue of $61.7B, with cloud services contributing 46% of total income.
Tesla delivered 450,000 vehicles in Q2 2025, generating $23B in revenue and $2.9B net income.
